stem: The graph of 9x + 4y = -53 in the xy-plane has a slope of m. What is the value of m?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Solving 9x + 4y = -53 for y gives 4y = -9x - 53, so y = (-9/4)x - 53/4. In slope-intercept form y = mx + b, the slope m is -9/4.

Choice B reverses the numerator and denominator. Choice C also reverses them and changes the sign. Choice D drops the negative sign that comes from moving 9x to the right-hand side.
